MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-14-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Daniel J. McQueen, Esq., from Sheppard Mullin Richter & Hampton LLP, 213-620-1780, for defendants and moving party
David W. Affeld, Esq., from Affeld, Grivakes, Zukker LLP, 310-979-8700, for plaintiff and opposing

Argued and the court ruled as follows:
DEFENDANTS UNIONBANCAL CORPORATION AND UNION BANK N.A.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.
Defendants' Motion for Summary Judgment is denied.
Motion for Summary adjudication as to 1st, 4th and 5th causes of action is denied.
Motion for Summary adjudication as to 2nd and 3rd causes of action is granted.
Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

Notice Of Motion To Deny Class Certification And/Or Strike Class Allegations
Off Calendar Oct-11-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANTS UNIONBANCAL CORPORATION AND UNION BANK, N.A.'S MOTION TO DENY CLASS CERTIFICATION AND/OR STRIKE CLASS ALLEGATIONS.

APPEARANCES: David W. Affeld, Esq. of Affeld Grivakes & Zucker, LLP 310/979-8700 for pltf & opposing party; Daniel J. McQueen, Esq. of Sheppard, Mullin, Richter & Hampton LLP 213/617-4183 for defts & moving parties.

RULING: Argued and the Court granted the motion to strike class allegations without prejudice to plaintiff seeking discovery of a new class representative and without prejudice to plaintiff filing a motion to amend to add class allegations/class representatives. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Deeming Admitted The Truthfulness Of Matters Requested Of Naomi Yamamoto And For An Award Of Monetary Sanctions; Points And Authorities ; Declarations Of Daniel J. Mcqueen And Melanie M. Hamilton
Off Calendar Oct-11-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANTS UNIONBANCAL CORPORATION AND UNION BANK, N.A.'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER DEEMING ADMITTED THE TRUTHFULNESS OF MATTERS REQUESTED OF NAOMI YAMAMOTO AND FOR AN AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS.

APPEARANCES: David W. Affeld, Esq. of Affeld Grivakes & Zucker, LLP 310/979-8700 for pltf & opposing party; Daniel J. McQueen, Esq. of Sheppard, Mullin, Richter & Hampton LLP 213/617-4183 for defts & moving parties.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Defendant's motion for deeming admitted the truthfulness of matters requested and award of sanctions is granted in part. Plaintiff served responses so the motion is moot as to that issue. Plaintiff is required to pay $400 in sanctions. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
